title: Verilator $sscanf reads into array with a delay

features.name: sscanf direct assignment to unpacked array element with timing
features.description: Code should include $sscanf reading directly into an unpacked array element with --timing enabled

features.name: sscanf to temporary variable then array assignment workaround
features.description: Code should include $sscanf reading into a temporary variable with subsequent assignment to unpacked array element as workaround for timing bug
